feedback: APPROVE. TDD is complete, well-structured, and proportionate to a complex integration/packaging scope. All required sections present (Overview, Architecture, Detailed Design, API, Data, Errors, Testing, Security, Performance, Impl Plan, BC, Open Qs, Deps, ADRs, Traceability). Concrete Zod schemas, TS interfaces, error/exit-code table, ADRs anchored to PRD FRs, and a PRD-FR-to-test traceability matrix are all present. Aligns with PRD goals/non-goals (safety preserved, no Vault provisioning, no scope expansion). Minor: ADR-02 vs TQ-02 disagreement on node-vault vs thin HTTP is acknowledged as deferred to T-05 — non-blocking.

findings.message: ADR-02 states 'thin HTTP client chosen' but §3.5 and TQ-02 leave node-vault vs thin client open; harmonise wording during T-05 (non-blocking).
tests/integration/deploy.test.ts is referenced in the traceability matrix and T-12 but not listed under §7.2 integration tests; consider adding it explicitly (non-blocking).
